title: 华为云发布全球首个端到端具身AI平台CloudRobo
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Huawei Cloud
@HuaweiCloud1
Unveiling the world’s first end-to-end embodied AI development platform!
Huawei Cloud CloudRobo streamlines the entire embodied AI development lifecycle—from data and models to deployment and integration—backed by a secure, trusted PB-scale data foundation.
At #INSPIRE2026 , Co-built Humanoid Robotics Innovation Center, Yijiahe Technology, and Shanghai Jiao Tong University highlighted CloudRobo’s core strengths:
• Dual evaluation system for data & models
• Fast assembly of active force control models
• Robots connected to cloud in hours, models deployed in minutes
Ready to shape the embodied AI future? Join the Embodied AI Zone today.
👉 Learn more: tinyurl.com/3zda3sr3
#HuaweiCloud #CloudRobo #EmbodiedAI #Robotics
00:00
9:15 AM · Jun 10, 2026 166 Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 华为云推出全球首个端到端具身AI开发平台CloudRobo，覆盖从数据、模型到部署、集成的全生命周期，基于PB级可信数据底座。在INSPIRE2026上，国家地方共建人形机器人创新中心、Yijiahe Technology、上海交通大学展示了其核心能力：数据与模型双评估系统、主动力控模型快速组装、机器人小时级上云、模型分钟级部署。
